ecarx.carext.display.view.window

Interface WindowViewObserver

  • All Superinterfaces:
    WindowObserver

    public interface WindowViewObserver
extends WindowObserver
    Window Root View observer
    Since:
    6

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onWindowFrameChanged(Window window, android.graphics.Rect oldFrame, android.graphics.Rect newFrame)
      Callback when the size of the window root view changed
      void onWindowVisibilityChanged(Window window, int visibility)
      Callback when the visibility state of the window root view changed

      • Methods inherited from interface ecarx.carext.display.view.window.WindowObserver

        onWindowAdded, onWindowRemoved

    • Method Detail

      • onWindowVisibilityChanged

        void onWindowVisibilityChanged(@NonNull
                               Window window,
                               int visibility)
        Callback when the visibility state of the window root view changed
        Parameters:
        window - The window information of the root view
        visibility - The visibility state of the window root view
        Since:
        6
        See Also:
        View.onWindowVisibilityChanged(int), View.getVisibility(), View.VISIBLE, View.INVISIBLE, View.GONE

      • onWindowFrameChanged

        void onWindowFrameChanged(@NonNull
                          Window window,
                          @NonNull
                          android.graphics.Rect oldFrame,
                          @NonNull
                          android.graphics.Rect newFrame)
        Callback when the size of the window root view changed

        see com.android.server.wm.WindowState#mWindowFrames see com.android.server.wm.WindowFrames#mContentFrame see com.android.server.wm.WindowFrames#mVisibleInsets

        Parameters:
        window - The window information of the root view
        oldFrame - The old frame of the window root view
        newFrame - The new frame of the window root view
        Since:
        6
        See Also:
        View.onSizeChanged(int, int, int, int), View.getGlobalVisibleRect(Rect)
